2605.04638.title: Gradients with Respect to Semantics Preserving Embeddings Tell the Uncertainty of Large Language Models
2605.04638.paper_summary: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is an important technique for ensuring the trustworthiness of LLMs, given their tendency to hallucinate. Existing state-of-the-art UQ approaches for free-form generation rely heavily on sampling, which incurs high computational cost and variance. In this work, we propose the first gradient-based UQ method for free-form generation, SemGrad, which is sampling-free and computationally efficient. Unlike prior gradient-based methods developed for classification tasks that operates in parameter space, we propose to consider gradients in semantic space. Our method builds on the key intuition that a confident LLM should maintain stable output distributions under semantically equivalent input perturbations. We interpret the stability as the gradients in semantic space and introduce a Semantic Preservation Score (SPS) to identify embeddings that best capture semantics, with respect to which gradients are computed. We further propose HybridGrad, which combines the strengths of SemGrad and parameter gradients. Experiments demonstrate that both of our methods provide efficient and effective uncertainty estimates, achieving superior performance than state-of-the-art methods, particularly in settings with multiple valid responses.
2605.04638.paper_summary_zh: 不確定性量化（UQ）是一項重要技術，用於確保大型語言模型（LLMs）的可信度，因為它們有產生幻覺的傾向。現有的最先進的UQ方法在自由形式生成上高度依賴於抽樣，這會產生高計算成本和變異性。在這項工作中，我們提出了首個基於梯度的自由形式生成UQ方法SemGrad，該方法無需抽樣且計算效率高。與先前為分類任務開發的基於梯度的方法不同，這些方法在參數空間中運作，我們建議考慮語義空間中的梯度。我們的方法基於這一關鍵直覺，即一個自信的LLM應在語義等價的輸入擾動下保持穩定的輸出分佈。我們將穩定性解釋為語義空間中的梯度，並引入語義保留分數（SPS）來識別最佳捕捉語義的嵌入，並根據這些嵌入計算梯度。我們進一步提出了HybridGrad，該方法結合了SemGrad和參數梯度的優勢。實驗表明，我們的兩種方法都提供了高效且有效的不確定性估計，並在性能上優於最先進的方法，特別是在存在多個有效反應的情況下。
2605.04638.author: Mingda Li et.al.
2605.04638.authors: Mingda Li, Rundong Lv, Xinyu Li, Weinan Zhang, Ting Liu
